title: Integrated Intermediate Modeling Capstone · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Build a decision model from messy requirements, data, constraints, and alternatives. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a stakeholder-ready computational modeling portfolio. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Decompose an unfamiliar decision into linked algebraic, statistical, and computational submodels.
Compare multiple plausible models with validation evidence and complexity costs.
Propagate uncertainty through best, expected, and adverse scenarios.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

steps.title: Calculate the unfamiliar quantity
steps.instruction: A measured quantity starts at 22 units, changes by −9 units, then by +8 units. Calculate the final quantity. Use the result to decide Model Governance for a stakeholder-ready computational modeling portfolio.
steps.why: The Model Governance result for a stakeholder-ready computational modeling portfolio is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Preserve the signs and compute 22 − 9 + 8; compare with the starting scale. Reconcile the result with this competency evidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Document data provenance, revisions, approvals, and conditions requiring model retirement.

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Before calculating Model Governance, predict the sign and approximate magnitude for a stakeholder-ready computational modeling portfolio. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then reconcile it with that prediction and A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Document data provenance, revisions, approvals, and conditions requiring model retirement.

hints: Preserve the signs and compute 22 − 9 + 8; compare with the starting scale.
Keep full working precision and round only the final reported value.
The accepted result is within 0.001 of the exact value and includes units.
